name: Stack Jeu Mobile 2D Pixel-Art
description: Stack recommandé pour domaine mobile-game-2d. Derive via decision tree (transverses Stage 1 + domain Stage 2) et SLR 37 PICOCs.

A1_engine.reco: Godot 4 (GDScript primary, C# for hot paths)

A4p_determinism.reco: _physics_process 60 Hz + seeded RandomNumberGenerator (PCG32) per-subsystem + record-input replay harness

A6_input_a11y.reco: Godot InputEvent natif + state machines custom (swipe/long-press/double-tap) + Control min-size 44 CSS px (WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.5 AAA) + DisplayServer.tts_speak

A7_persistence.reco: Platform-native saves (Google Play Games Saved Games + Apple iCloud Key-Value Store)

A8_asset_pipeline.reco: Godot Lossy 2D import + build-time TextureAtlas + plain AAB (Android) / App-Sliced IPA (iOS) ; ASTC VRAM pour HUD persistent uniquement

B8_font_rendering.reco: MSDF pour scalable UI + bitmap pour retro HUD + HarfBuzz via Godot TextServer pour Arabic/CJK/Indic

B10_animation.reco: Aseprite frame-by-frame + Godot AnimationPlayer state machine

B11_pixel_art_tool.reco: Aseprite (commercial one-time, palette-indexed, .aseprite + PNG+JSON sidecar export)
B11_pixel_art_tool.alternatives_strict_foss: LibreSprite v1.1 stable OR Pixelorama (si budget zero dépenses one-time)

C13_save_scheduling.reco: Event-driven + SQLite WAL + Godot NOTIFICATION_APPLICATION_PAUSED hook

C14_schema_migration.reco: Additive-only JSON + save_version field + stepwise manual migrations per breaking change

C15_save_integrity.reco_with_backend: Keystore-HMAC (clé TEE/Secure Enclave) + server sign on sync + Play Integrity/App Attest UNIQUEMENT leaderboard submit + IAP verification

D17_publishing.reco: Fastlane + Play Console Internal→Beta→Production staged rollout 5→20→50→100% + crash-rate halt triggers

D19_dynamic_delivery.reco: Plain AAB/IPA (pixel-art <200MB rentre dans AAB base)

D20_privacy_manifest.reco: Apple Privacy Manifest + Play Data Safety + UMP (GDPR consent) + ATT (iOS 14.5+)

D21_launch_surface.reco: Android 12+ SplashScreen API + adaptive icons + iOS multi-variant + monochrome/themed icon support

E22_ads.reco: AdMob single-SDK direct via godot-admob plugin

E22b_ad_ux.reco: Rewarded-opt-in primary + anchored adaptive banner + frequency cap ≥60s + no-interstitial-on-splash + WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.8 target size

E23_iap_abstraction.reco: OpenIAP (hyodotdev monorepo) — unified GDScript API Play Billing 8.x + StoreKit 2

E25_receipt_validation.reco: Platform-native Play Billing sandbox + StoreKit 2 local verify
E25_receipt_validation.reco_with_backend: Custom HTTP endpoint calling Apple App Store Server API + Google Play Developer API

F26_leaderboards.reco: Platform-native Google Play Games Services v2 + Apple Game Center

F28_identity.reco: Anonymous-first UUID local + Sign in with Apple (iOS mandatory si autre auth) + GPGS Sign-In (Android optionnel)

F29_deep_linking.reco: Universal Links (iOS) + App Links (Android) + SKAdNetwork 4 + Play Install Referrer

G30_localization_workflow.reco: gettext PO (Godot native) + XLIFF interchange + Weblate self-host + pseudo-localization CI

G31_rtl_bidi.reco: UAX #9 isolates (FSI/PDI) + Godot layout_direction + per-sprite rtl_policy (mirror/preserve/replace) + first-strong auto on user inputs

G32_message_format.reco: ICU MessageFormat 1 + gettext PO + CLDR 6 categories

H33_cicd.reco: GitHub Actions workflow YAML + self-hosted runner sur VPS + Godot CLI headless export + Fastlane overlay

H34_device_testing.reco: Local Android Studio AVD + Xcode Simulator + Waydroid (optionnel) + TestFlight + Play Internal Testing + devices physiques

H35_crash_reporting.reco: Play Console Vitals + Xcode Organizer + MetricKit (platform-native)
H35_crash_reporting.reco_with_backend: GlitchTip self-host + sentry-godot SDK pointant DSN vers GlitchTip

H36_analytics.reco: Play Console + App Store Connect dashboards

H37_remote_config.reco_with_backend: Unleash self-host OR static JSON + ETag sur VPS

I37_test_methodology.reco: gdUnit4 unit + scene_runner integration + replay-based regression (release-candidate branches) + periodic playtesting

I39_accessibility.reco: Pixel-art palette-swap colorblind modes + GAG Basic all 5 categories + OS-bridged prefers-reduced-motion

J43_ai_asset_gate.reco: Composed gate : palette-lock + atlas-UV schema + pHash golden-image + audio fingerprint + threshold human spot-check + provenance manifest (NIST AI 600-1 + ISO 42001)

platform_mandatory_services: Google Play Games Saved Games (saves cross-device Android)
Apple iCloud Key-Value Store (saves cross-device iOS)

quality_attributes_iso_25010_2023.functional_suitability: 37 PICOCs couverts, chaque primary traceable à ≥ 1 anchor
quality_attributes_iso_25010_2023.interaction_capability: GAG Basic + WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.5 + Apple HIG 44pt
quality_attributes_iso_25010_2023.maintainability: MIT engine + Foundation governance + XLIFF + gettext PO
